taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Front-end development, React, TypeScript, Back-end development, Python
skill_match_scores: Front-end development:0.5, React:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, Back-end development:1.0, Python:1.0
must_have_quals: Experience shipping production software and owning meaningful systems or product areas, Strong proficiency in either modern front-end development (e.g., React, TypeScript) or backend systems (e.g., Python, APIs, data pipelines), with the ability to work across the stack when needed, Experience designing scalable, reliable systems and thinking through architecture, performance, and long-term maintainability, Solid engineering fundamentals, including testing, code review, and iterative development practices, Ability to translate ambiguous problems and customer needs into clear technical solutions, Strong collaboration and communication skills in cross-functional environments
preferred_quals: Experience working with LLMs, AI/ML systems, or data-intensive applications, Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and modern infrastructure patterns, Experience in startup or high-growth environments
core_responsibilities: End-to-end product experiences that define how customers interact with our platform - from polished, intuitive interfaces to the scalable systems behind them, AI-driven capabilities powered by LLMs, turning research and experimentation into production-grade features used in high-stakes, real-world workflows, The core backend services, APIs, and data pipelines that power evaluation, orchestration, and intelligent decision-making at scale, High-performance, reliable systems designed to handle growing volume, complexity, and customer demands, The internal tooling, monitoring, and infrastructure that ensures our AI workflows are accurate, observable, and continuously improving
job_summary: Supio is looking for product-minded engineers who enjoy building across the stack and owning problems end-to-end. The role involves crafting user experiences, designing scalable systems, and applying LLMs and AI in real-world products.
